payload.subject: Investigate vBook Allwin wave 009 server-to-GPU refine timeout

topology.required_path: vBook -> Windows vtext CLI -> Linux vtext server/LLM relay -> GPU Ollama

incident.lesson: 量化模式/主升浪战法/前途无量模式—跟踪高控盘主力的利器
incident.observed_error: Server relay reported upstream 192.168.0.33:7866 read timeout after 900 seconds on both attempts

windows_fix.summary: vBook bundle now forces server relay, rejects direct/disabled refine, and writes contract-complete fallback artifacts on runtime refine failure

checks: Inspect vtext-server.service and vtext.llm_worker logs for both UTC attempt windows
Verify active ollama_url is http://192.168.0.33:7866 and llm_timeout is 900
Confirm the LLM worker remained healthy after each timeout
Reproduce through the vtext server /llm/chat path with the existing raw transcript or an equivalent long payload
Determine whether the limit is relay behavior, Ollama/model execution, context size, resource pressure, or lesson content
response_required: Root cause and supporting log timestamps/job ids
Exact service-side change if one is required
Restart and health evidence if the service is changed
Explicit recovery guidance: refine-only retry, same-run resume, or keep paused
constraints: Do not move production GPU ownership to the Windows client
Do not include large logs in sync; provide concise evidence and server-side paths
Do not restart the service until logs needed for diagnosis are preserved
